inputs.tags: Mandopop, Urban Guofeng, Young Male Baritone, Clean vocals, Dry vocal mix, Forward vocals, 88BPM, 4/4 Quantized groove, Crisp Pipa, Modern R&B percussion, Pluck synths, Warm melodic bass, No heavy reverb, No long notes, No vibrato, Staccato delivery, Catchy hooks, Repetitive melody, Studio-Quality, Transparent mix, High-fidelity, Anti-melancholy, Rhythmic pop
inputs.lyrics:
[Intro: 8s]

[Instrumental: Crisp Pipa plucking, Staccato rhythm]

[Instrumental: Modern Trap-lite hi-hats, Sub-bass pulse]

[Verse 1: 15s]

[Vocal: Young Male Baritone, Clean, Conversational, Low intensity]

[Instrumental: Minimalist Rhodes chords, Steady kick]
轉角的 巷弄,
開了家 旗袍鋪,
像極了 妳 針綫裏 的 溫度.
異鄉的 霜降,
模糊了 舊地圖,
我 停下 步子 却 找不到 歸路.

[Verse: Main Theme: 30s]

[Vocal: Catchy, Rhythmic, No vibrato, Staccato phrasing]

[Instrumental: Full Band Entry, Strong 4/4 Beat, Pipa doubling melody]

[Instrumental: Layered Pluck Synths, Deep Groove]
一盞 舊燈火, 映著 妳 輪廓,
這場 故鄉夢, 我 捨不得 破.
看 幾番 秋色, 聽 幾聲 離合,
唯有 妳的美, 依然 深刻.
一盞 舊燈火, 映著 妳 輪廓,
這場 故鄉夢, 我 捨不得 破.
那 漫天 星斗, 像 妳的 溫柔,
等我 這一回, 攜手 白頭.

[Bridge: 10s]

[Vocal: Spoken style, Half-whispered]

[Instrumental: Drum and Bass only, Sudden silence of Pipa]
城南 煙雨 重,
相思 意 難平.

[Verse: Main Theme: 30s]

[Vocal: Same melody as previous theme, Confident, Melodic]

[Instrumental: Maximum energy, Anthemic arrangement, High-fidelity]
一盞 舊燈火, 映著 妳 輪廓,
這場 故鄉夢, 我 捨不得 破.
看 幾番 秋色, 聽 幾聲 離合,
唯有 妳的美, 依然 深刻.
一盞 舊燈火

映著 妳 輪廓,
這場 故鄉夢, 我 捨不得 破.
那 漫天 星斗, 像 妳的 溫柔,
(whispered, gently, stable)
等我 這一回, 攜手 白頭.
(vocal stop, staccato)

[Outro: 5s]
[Vocal: None, Pure Instrumental]
[Instrumental: Pipa mimicking main melody hook, Gentle fade out, Fading]
[End]
